name: Steve Chabot
subject: My Predictions for 2019
body:
My Predictions for 2019 No Images? [Click here](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-e-jttrhutd-kujkulhluu-jy/) [](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jttrhutd-kujkulhluu-r/) [](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jttrhutd-kujkulhluu-y/) [](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jttrhutd-kujkulhluu-j/) [](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jttrhutd-kujkulhluu-t/)
### [My Predictions for 2019](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jttrhutd-kujkulhluu-i/)
Well, it's that time of year again. Time for me to go out on a limb, and predict what's going to happen in the upcoming year. Here goes. [Read this entry >>](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jttrhutd-kujkulhluu-d/) _Previous Weekly Posts_ [](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jttrhutd-kujkulhluu-h/) [](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jttrhutd-kujkulhluu-k/)
### [A Shutdown, Troop Withdrawals, and a Resignation](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jttrhutd-kujkulhluu-u/)
First of all, I hope you and your loved ones had a very blessed Christmas. As we should always remember at this time of year, there are those in uniform and otherwise serving our nation in remote areas around the globe, who cannot be with their families, and may God keep them contented and protected until they are back home with their loved ones. [Read this entry >>](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jttrhutd-kujkulhluu-o/) [](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jttrhutd-kujkulhluu-b/) [](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jttrhutd-kujkulhluu-n/)
### [Another Shutdown?](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jttrhutd-kujkulhluu-p/)
Is the government really going to shut down in a couple days? And if so who's to blame? And will Social Security checks still go out? And will our soldiers facing hostile forces like the Taliban in Afghanistan still get paid? And if it snows, will my street still get cleared? WHAT'S GOING TO HAPPEN? [Read this entry >>](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jttrhutd-kujkulhluu-x/) [](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jttrhutd-kujkulhluu-m/) [](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jttrhutd-kujkulhluu-c/)
### [Google - One Reason Republicans May Have a Harder Time Getting Their Message Out](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jttrhutd-kujkulhluu-q/)
We had an interesting hearing in the House Judiciary Committee yesterday. The witness at the hearing was the CEO of GOOGLE - one of the most important companies in the world today. The CEO was Sundar Pichai, not necessarily a household name, but a very important mover and shaker nonetheless on the world scene today. [Read this entry >>](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jttrhutd-kujkulhluu-a/) [](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jttrhutd-kujkulhluu-f/) [](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jttrhutd-kujkulhluu-z/)
### [The Return of the Queen](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jttrhutd-kujkulhluu-v/)
For 60 years, the Delta Queen cruised the rivers of America, giving its passengers a unique experience of what it was like to travel America's waterways back in the 1800's. Then 10 years ago, it all came to a halt, and this beautiful queen was chained to a dock in Chattanooga, Tennessee. How did this happen? [Read this entry >>](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jttrhutd-kujkulhluu-e/) [](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jttrhutd-kujkulhluu-s/) [](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jttrhutd-kujkulhluu-g/)
### [Confrontation at the Border](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jttrhutd-kujkulhluu-w/)
Thousands of mostly young males from Honduras, Guatemala, and El Salvador, have joined together in caravans and are trying to get into our country through our southern border. Yes, there are some women and children too, and they are inevitably the ones CNN and others interview, and put in their news coverage of unfolding events. But most of the people coming are young, and male, and without accompanying children. [Read this entry >>](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jttrhutd-kujkulhluu-yd/) [Donate](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jttrhutd-kujkulhluu-yh/) [Get a Yard Sign](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jttrhutd-kujkulhluu-yk/) | [](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jttrhutd-kujkulhluu-yu/)| [](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jttrhutd-kujkulhluu-jl/)| [](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jttrhutd-kujkulhluu-jr/)
---|---|---
2300 Montana Ave, Cincinnati, OH 45211
You are receiving this email because of your connection to our cause. If you receive this email in error, please use the unsubscribe link below and remove yourself from future mailings.
[ Like ](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-fb-jttrhutd-kujkulhluu-jj/)
[ Tweet ](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-tw-jttrhutd-kujkulhluu-jt/)
[ Forward ](http://stevechabotforcongress.forwardtomyfriend.com/r-kujkulhluu-961825B2-jttrhutd-l-ji)
[Preferences](https://stevechabotforcongress.updatemyprofile.com/r-jttrhutd-961825B2-kujkulhluu-jd) | [Unsubscribe](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-u-jttrhutd-kujkulhluu-jh/)
clean_body: My Predictions for 2019 No Images? Well, it's that time of year again. Time for me to go out on a limb, and predict what's going to happen in the upcoming year. Here goes. Previous Weekly Posts First of all, I hope you and your loved ones had a very blessed Christmas. As we should always remember at this time of year, there are those in uniform and otherwise serving our nation in remote areas around the globe, who cannot be with their families, and may God keep them contented and protected until they are back home with their loved ones. Is the government really going to shut down in a couple days? And if so who's to blame? And will Social Security checks still go out? And will our soldiers facing hostile forces like the Taliban in Afghanistan still get paid? And if it snows, will my street still get cleared? WHAT'S GOING TO HAPPEN? We had an interesting hearing in the House Judiciary Committee yesterday. The witness at the hearing was the CEO of GOOGLE - one of the most important companies in the world today. The CEO was Sundar Pichai, not necessarily a household name, but a very important mover and shaker nonetheless on the world scene today. For 60 years, the Delta Queen cruised the rivers of America, giving its passengers a unique experience of what it was like to travel America's waterways back in the 1800's. Then 10 years ago, it all came to a halt, and this beautiful queen was chained to a dock in Chattanooga, Tennessee. How did this happen? Thousands of mostly young males from Honduras, Guatemala, and El Salvador, have joined together in caravans and are trying to get into our country through our southern border. Yes, there are some women and children too, and they are inevitably the ones CNN and others interview, and put in their news coverage of unfolding events. But most of the people coming are young, and male, and without accompanying children. | | | ---|---|--- 2300 Montana Ave, Cincinnati, OH 45211

_Nancy Pelosi stayed at a luxury Hawaiian resort during the Democrat Government shutdown._ While the Government shutdown gave a heightened sense of uncertainty to our hardworking federal employees, Nancy was having a blast at a [private Hawaiian resort.](http://email.robly.com/wf/click?upn=3qP3xl6Iy86fMdiFlFopyDKyJoXcixlEa3OT3lfsVg3UZbpsweu8dTzqcZMF5TS3_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCFb47pW8iDRAYLsM9sf9wIa92fG-2FsxU68zXzzMA2nO2VCunl2bm-2FhLXsWS8P3XITs28GUU7Mnlu37POPaWv9myv4YWBbFU9plZi0-2B42tZfBaUujH4mxA3e6jOiyDa5q6HKz45-2B17g6DUNL-2BnIMAR30M854xgQXbZ1QgCef6UQUajxYpovlG9xVhqCodRzj-2BYKAVwxlfno0cHTM9yB37S9d9e8Ao8pW3bWc3RbXsL2t1CQF8Oh9Um0TrTezRtiv8ayB5QALbuS0YIIlXwZrZ00lU5RzvVLSKbjteL7dkD6NH3LM0gaJOh3pJe-2BvByXopScbjU-2BvyZ5BtAQfey-2BNAxupTrotVDKwkWUqd1UenQWuTOWrduRe1TVvQFpwGn2zE-2F50YWvz7E0HM1foRhE02Wlk3w9fuUf-2B4XZtiMkmvpzp-2BKQ-3D-3D) The amenities? Nancy's getaway was a luxury resort with an oceanfront pool and even a _**SPA WITHOUT WALLS** _and its** _SIGNATURE LOMI LOMI MASSAGE_** , according to press reports. Nancy likes an "open borders" spa as much as an open borders country, it seems. Pelosi, instead of helping end the shutdown she and Congressional Democrats created, relaxed and enjoyed her oceanside view. What will New Hampshire's members of Congress, Chris Pappas and Anne Kuster, do in response to Nancy's Shutdown Luau? Well, they'll vote to give her back the gavel as Speaker of the House. [Send a message by donating whatever you can today so we can ensure Kuster, Pappas, and Pelosi will hear us loud and clear in 2020.](http://email.robly.com/wf/click?upn=3qP3xl6Iy86fMdiFlFopyBO5kQrx-2FesLRaGJ1fd7TCqcycBI512yYjvguVrkx1y-2Fz9KPysRoLmviHiSY-2BFOWSFj7RUUe8aVsFVM5Mv1fPF0-3D_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCFb47pW8iDRAYLsM9sf9wIa92fG-2FsxU68zXzzMA2nO2VCunl2bm-2FhLXsWS8P3XITs28GUU7Mnlu37POPaWv9myv4YWBbFU9plZi0-2B42tZfBaUujH4mxA3e6jOiyDa5q6HKz45-2B17g6DUNL-2BnIMAR30M854xgQXbZ1QgCef6UQUajxYpovlG9xVhqCodRzj-2BYKAVwxlfno0cHTM9yB37S9d9e8Ao8pW3bWc3RbXsL2t1CSftJUbIpIe6WnPnLKInQksPBsS7JEl0SCH9oYqkmmq-2F-2BfuK1tbJo5G6RqAnwKFY9JLahxXPPk0-2BSlyCzj6jHLMqFAV9f-2F9tWBJgeiO0AgbTiY1niFFY2Cw1Pijo1RwHplg1TQ5fgC3W9XJO0MYZe0TLy9iF0fkTNyN43CN-2BShaXQoJmoKnKiu56LYAi8ivHsA-3D-3D) We need your help! name: Jay Inslee
subject: Congress must take climate action [SIGN ON]
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jay Inslee for Washington
body:
Help me pressure Congress to focus on the threat of climate change.

| [](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7a93e/2f5ea88d/79c58e31/2cbdcb68/224765559/VEsH/ "https://action.jayinslee.com/page/s/tell-congress-to-take-action-on-climate?utm_source=ema_2019-01-03_congress-start-climate&source=ema_2019-01-03_congress-start-climate&utm_campaign=congress-start-climate&utm_medium=ema") Friend, Today, the newly elected Congress meets for the first time in the other Washington. And they have a lot to clean up, starting with reopening our federal government, which is currently shut down thanks to Donald Trump's constant temper tantrums. But cleaning up Trump's messes must be only the start of an ambitious year of progress. The Democratic House has already promised to tackle thoughtful and aggressive reforms to strengthen our democracy. **And taking on climate change must top their priority list.** This is no time to be distracted by Donald Trump's antics. President Trump's retreat on the environment is having a terrible impact on communities across our country and our world. We need to recommit to America's role as a global leader. We need to create new clean energy jobs in our ever-changing economy. And we must protect our planet. All this means tackling climate change with laser-focus. But I need your help to increase pressure on Congress. [**Join me in telling Congress: We can't let Trump stop us from tackling the single most dangerous threat to our future!**](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7a93e/2f5ea88d/79c58e31/2cbdcb68/224765559/VEsE/ "https://action.jayinslee.com/page/s/tell-congress-to-take-action-on-climate?utm_source=ema_2019-01-03_congress-start-climate&source=ema_2019-01-03_congress-start-climate&utm_campaign=congress-start-climate&utm_medium=ema") Look, there are many important things that this year's Congress will have to tackle, from immigration reform to gun safety. All the while, they will face whining, fear-mongering, and Donald Trump's continued downward spiral. But each of these critical issues is inextricably linked to our climate. Combating climate change means clean energy jobs, it means safer and healthier communities, and it means taking on the biggest challenge we've ever faced. Make no mistake, combating climate change is the linchpin to our progressive future. Luckily, many of the newly elected Democrats are ready for this fight. They're boldly demanding action. I'm immensely proud of them for putting climate at the top of their agenda. And now, they need to know they have our support. [**Tell Congress right now: Make ending climate change a priority -- this issue will define our future.**](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7a93e/2f5ea88d/79c58e31/2cbdcb68/224765559/VEsF/ "https://action.jayinslee.com/page/s/tell-congress-to-take-action-on-climate?utm_source=ema_2019-01-03_congress-start-climate&source=ema_2019-01-03_congress-start-climate&utm_campaign=congress-start-climate&utm_medium=ema") Here in Washington state, we know the power of investing in our environment. Let's make sure the other Washington follows our lead. Very truly yours, Jay Inslee | [SIGN ON »](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7a93e/2f5ea88d/79c58e31/2cbdcb68/224765559/VEsC/ "https://action.jayinslee.com/page/s/tell-congress-to-take-action-on-climate?utm_source=ema_2019-01-03_congress-start-climate&source=ema_2019-01-03_congress-start-climate&utm_campaign=congress-start-climate&utm_medium=ema")

clean_body: Help me pressure Congress to focus on the threat of climate change. | "" Friend, Today, the newly elected Congress meets for the first time in the other Washington. And they have a lot to clean up, starting with reopening our federal government, which is currently shut down thanks to Donald Trump's constant temper tantrums. But cleaning up Trump's messes must be only the start of an ambitious year of progress. The Democratic House has already promised to tackle thoughtful and aggressive reforms to strengthen our democracy. And taking on climate change must top their priority list. This is no time to be distracted by Donald Trump's antics. President Trump's retreat on the environment is having a terrible impact on communities across our country and our world. We need to recommit to America's role as a global leader. We need to create new clean energy jobs in our ever-changing economy. And we must protect our planet. All this means tackling climate change with laser-focus. But I need your help to increase pressure on Congress. "" Look, there are many important things that this year's Congress will have to tackle, from immigration reform to gun safety. All the while, they will face whining, fear-mongering, and Donald Trump's continued downward spiral. But each of these critical issues is inextricably linked to our climate. Combating climate change means clean energy jobs, it means safer and healthier communities, and it means taking on the biggest challenge we've ever faced. Make no mistake, combating climate change is the linchpin to our progressive future. Luckily, many of the newly elected Democrats are ready for this fight. They're boldly demanding action. I'm immensely proud of them for putting climate at the top of their agenda. And now, they need to know they have our support. "" Here in Washington state, we know the power of investing in our environment. Let's make sure the other Washington follows our lead. Very truly yours, Jay Inslee | ""

name: Greg Stanton
subject: just getting started
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stanton for Congress
body:
Today I experienced a great honor - I was sworn in as a U.S. Congressman.

First, and I know I've said this before but I'll say it again, thank you. Your generous donations and countless volunteer hours got me here - I promise to work hard every day to make sure that the voices of Arizona's many diverse communities are heard in Washington.

We have a lot to get done over the coming two years and I can't wait to get to work - starting today.

Again, thank you.

\-- _Greg _

[__](https://act.myngp.com/el/5HJzFN1hdrrCaA7GQp7gvbirD7ne-KUqslJto8ZFACk=/kM-699SILDQOGJ16uoQ5lcKBAlOoR0qRoLdDVzk633M=?refcode=X_010319_swearingin_a&amount=25&recurring=auto)

Paid for by Stanton for Congress

name: Wayne MacDonald & Alan Glassman
subject: Remembering Bill Tobin
body:
Dear Fellow Republican, It is with a heavy heart that we inform you of Bill Tobin's passing, following a long fight against cancer. Bill served as Belknap County GOP Chairman and State Representative, and was always a great member of our New Hampshire Republican Party; we are certainly worse off without him. He will be missed by many. As arrangements become available, we will forward them along to you. For now, please be sure to include his wife Faith and the Tobin family in your prayers. Sincerely, Wayne MacDonald NHGOP Chairman Alan Glassman NHGOP Vice Chairman | |
---
---
| This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)

name: Sherrod Brown
subject: Affected by the shutdown?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Sherrod Brown
body:
Reply to this message with your story.
|
---

| | Each day that passes, we get another reminder of the consequences of a government shutdown for everyone whose name isn't "Trump." Hundreds of thousands of workers -- people with families, bills, and commitments -- will not collect their regular paychecks. They're janitors who work at agency offices. They don't make much to begin with, and now they're not getting a paycheck. They don't know if they'll be able to pay their rent. They're security guards, who just pushed their finances to the limit with holiday gifts and travel. Now they don't know when they'll be able to pay that down. They're TSA agents checking IDs at the airport, or personnel at Wright-Patterson, who are still expected to work today, but have no idea when they'll be paid for it. Congress usually pays federal workers retroactively when the government shuts down like this -- as it well should. But many of these workers -- those same janitors, security guards, and food service workers -- are treated as contractors, not government employees. So even if Congress pays retroactively, they won't receive a paycheck. As long as President Trump is holding the government hostage, workers are left in the dust. And to add insult to injury, President Trump has frozen automatic cost-of-living raises federal employees get every year. So not only are these workers not getting paid, they're not getting the pay increase they deserve, either. **If you or someone you know is affected by this shutdown, I want to hear about it. Reply directly to this email with your story.** Trump doesn't care about workers. Trump cares about Trump. But I'm concerned about the people who make this nation work -- not the person in the White House who shuts it down. I'm looking forward to hearing from you. With gratitude, Sherrod
---

|
---
[www.sherrodbrown.com](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffddd/4462dc26/88b9bea4/201ee210/3018780710/VEsH/ "https://www.sherrodbrown.com/")

name: gina.raimondo
subject: Join me this Saturday!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Gina Raimondo
body:
|
---
[ ](https://organizing.ginaraimondo.com/page/m/1f41a02f/5e076a9e/54aeee5e/14424a80/3298485408/VEsH/ "http://ginaraimondo.com")

| |
# PLEASE JOIN US TO CELEBRATE RHODE ISLAND INAUGURATION 2019
Hi Friend, I hope your 2019 is off to a great start.**I'm writing to personally invite you to celebrate the 2019 Inauguration with me, Andy, and the General Officers of Rhode Island.** As our state faces real challenges, we are looking forward to the opportunity to join together, enjoy some of the best Rhode Island has to offer, and reflect on our path forward. **On Saturday, January 5th, you're invited to an Open House at the Rhode Island State House from 11:00AM to 2:00PM** , which will feature tastings from Rhode Island restaurants with food and beverage producers, as well as performances from a diverse variety of talented local groups. The open house is free to the public, with a suggested donation of a non-perishable food item to support the Rhode Island Food Bank. Bring your whole family! **Immediately thereafter at 2:00PM, the celebration will continue in Downtown Providence with a family ice skate at the Alex & Ani Skating Rink.** Families are invited to bring their kids and join my family for an open skate. The first 500 guests will receive free skating and ice skate rentals, along with hot chocolate and cookies. Tommy and Ceci are looking forward to it! I hope to see many of you on Saturday. Thank you for your friendship and support. Together, we can keep Rhode Island moving forward. Warm Wishes, Gina \--- **__Open House restaurants and food & beverage producers:__**
* _American Mussel Harvesters, Inc._
* _The Backyard Food Company_
* _Beth Bakes_
* _The Burgundian: Coffee and Waffles_
* _Dave's Coffee_
* _El Rancho Grande_
* _Fountain and Co._
* _Gastros_
* _Gerbs_
* _GottaQ Smokehouse BBQ_
* _Granny Squibb's Organic Iced Tea_
* _HG80_
* _Los Andes_
* _Narragansett Creamery_
* _The Perfect Sweet_
* _Renaissance Providence Downtown Hotel_
* _RI Mushroom Co._
* _Seriously Good Ice Cream_
* _Sin_
* _Yacht Club Soda_
* _Yoleni's_

__**Open House Performers:**__
* _Jump!_
* _The Kelly School of Irish Dance_
* _Salsa Y Gaitas_

---
|
---
| | [Donate Now](https://organizing.ginaraimondo.com/page/m/1f41a02f/5e076a9e/54aeee5e/14424a83/3298485408/VEsE/ "http://ginaraimondo.com/donate")

[](https://organizing.ginaraimondo.com/page/m/1f41a02f/5e076a9e/54aeee5e/14424a82/3298485408/VEsF/ "https://www.facebook.com/gina.raimondo/") [](https://organizing.ginaraimondo.com/page/m/1f41a02f/5e076a9e/54aeee5e/14424a85/3298485408/VEsC/ "http://twitter.com/ginaraimondo") [](https://organizing.ginaraimondo.com/page/m/1f41a02f/5e076a9e/54aeee5e/14424a84/3298485408/VEsD/ "http://instagram.com/ginaraimondo")

Providence, RI 02940

This email is not intended for any Rhode Island state government employees. If you are a Rhode Island state government employee, please disregard and let us know so we can unsubscribe you from future emails. Per Rhode Island State Law, individuals may contribute a maximum of $1,000 per year. Business and corporate checks are prohibited.
